title: Step S-SWQT-0003-1: Step S-SWQT-0003-1: 核心状态矩阵与覆盖统计

items.statement: 建立 Button、Input、Select 与图标按钮的可审计状态矩阵，并把状态覆盖与明确例外变成可回归的浏览器证据。

inScope: 在真实消费者夹具中呈现 default、hover、focus-visible、disabled、loading、error、empty、selected 等适用状态。
以双主题、compact/data-dense/lg/xl 视口运行截图与 axe。
生成组件×状态×主题×视口覆盖清单和例外统计。

items.researchEvidence: R-SWUI-001 缺口复核：现有 fixture 只覆盖少量组件和常态，缺少系统状态矩阵与覆盖基线。

userDecisions: 用户选择 Option B 并发送 auto。
items.axisPositioning: required: design-system runtime + browser/a11y validation; UI state fixture and test evidence share one invariant.
items.axisSplitSnapshot: 本 Step 聚合状态夹具、矩阵与统计，因为三者必须共同证明每个状态实际可渲染且可审计。
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: not-applicable：仅使用已有 Playwright 输出目录，不创建长期临时交接物。

items.problemDefinition: 现有浏览器矩阵只验证少数常态组件，无法证明核心组件的状态面在主题和断点下均可用。
items.requirementsDefinition: 为核心组件建立稳定状态夹具、矩阵测试、截图/axe 证据和例外统计；每项例外必须有原因。
nonGoals: 不把 hover 伪状态伪造成浏览器无法验证的事实。
items.plainLanguage: 让每个用户可见状态都有一张可复跑的证据表，而不是只靠默认外观。

candidateOptions.B: 建立命名状态夹具、矩阵清单与浏览器断言。

recommendedOption.rationale: 能同时捕获状态回归、可访问性回归和覆盖退化。

items.openDecisions: none；状态集合由组件现有公开 props/语义决定。
items.granularityDecision: fine-enough：夹具、测试和统计共享同一状态覆盖不变量；若新增独立组件域或视觉审查工具，再拆分。
implementationPlan: 盘点核心组件的可表达状态。
构建可访问的状态夹具和显式矩阵元数据。
增加 Playwright 截图、axe 与覆盖统计断言。
将例外及其原因写入文档。
items.testCaseDesign: 每个矩阵元至少映射一个真实 DOM 状态；主题/视口以现有 projects 交叉；axe 覆盖可访问性。
items.acceptanceToTestMapping: AC1/AC2→Playwright 矩阵与截图；AC3→统计脚本；AC4→例外清单校验。
items.regressionTestDesign: 新增状态或删除状态时矩阵断言与快照立即失败。
items.residualRisk: 原生 hover/focus 的视觉差异仍受浏览器平台影响，使用语义状态和截图基线降低风险。

readiness.reason: 已存在消费者、Playwright projects、axe 和基线命令。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: examples/ui-consumer state fixtures, Playwright matrix, screenshots, and quality documentation; no public API change.
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: Button/Input/Select/icon states receive light/dark × compact/data-dense/lg/xl visual and axe evidence, including actual hover and disabled Select.
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: Consumer typecheck, static contract, production build, normal Playwright matrix, and packed-consumer browser matrix.
executionContract.rollbackNotes: Revert the fixture/test/doc changes and generated project screenshot baselines together.

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Added named Button, icon-button, Input, Select, empty, and ThemeControl-adjacent state fixtures; added DOM/ARIA/hover/screenshot/axe coverage and 24 project screenshot baselines.
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: Every applicable named state now has a rendered fixture and browser evidence across the formal themes and viewport projects.
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: No @swui/ui public component API, product shell, or routing was changed.

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Used real disabled Select and pointer hover rather than documenting unrendered inherited behavior.
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: Screenshot update initially exposed unstable Recharts animation; animations were disabled and normal-mode regressions passed afterward.

validationReferences.notes: 34 passed, 6 intentional data-dense scope skips across eight projects.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: bun run check:design-contract; bun run example:build
validationReferences.notes: Build has only Vite 500 kB chunk advisory.
Nested isolated and workspace-hoisted tarball consumers each ran the browser matrix: 34 passed, 6 intentional skips.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Changes are confined to the consumer fixture, Playwright evidence, screenshots, and quality documentation; public APIs remain unchanged; implementation-ready brief is complete.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: No public API surface was exercised.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Typecheck, design contract, production build, normal browser matrix (34 passed, 6 intentional scope skips), and two packed-consumer browser matrices passed.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Vite reports a non-blocking 695 kB chunk advisory.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Named DOM/ARIA states, actual pointer hover, screenshots, and axe run across light/dark × four viewport projects; disabled Select is rendered and asserted.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Native hover visuals remain platform-sensitive, so full-page baselines are pointer-neutral while interaction is exercised separately.

gateOutcomes.gate: provenance, documentation graph, and project facts
gateOutcomes.evidence: The Step retains sourceFeature F-SWQT-0003; docs/README links quality-matrix; exceptions include a dated visual-review record.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Private registry credentials remain an explicitly owned external follow-up.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Stable Step path, browser baselines, and implementation evidence were rechecked after the final disabled-Select correction.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Historical global workflow-numbering findings are recorded outside this Feature boundary.

items.projectCompanionFactDecision: not-needed: existing companion validation handoff remains accurate; quality matrix documents the added local evidence.
items.residualRisk: Remote registry publication and the legacy repository-wide numbering migration are explicitly non-blocking external/governance follow-ups.
items.followUp: Promote Step 1, then release the token/chart governance dependency.

items.validationSummary: Typecheck, static contract, production build, eight-project browser matrix (34 passed; 6 intentional scope skips), and isolated/hoisted packed-consumer browser verification passed.
items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.

requirementAudit.followUp: Review owner may enrich the audit before delivery when richer evidence is required.
